rankings.reason: Captures the futuristic 2050 vision best with flying cars and robotics, aligning perfectly with the influencer persona.
Offers a highly practical and seamless digital experience, though it feels more like an evolution of current technology.
Includes creative entertainment options, but the focus on traffic management and standard security feels less innovative.
Fails to meet the futuristic criteria entirely, describing a standard, manual airport process instead of a 2050 experience.
